results.rendered_html: paraśu—rāma m. ‘Rama with the axe’, N. of one of the three Rāmas (son of Jamad-agni and sixth Avatāra of Viṣṇu, he was a typical Brāhman and his history typifies the contests between the Brahmans and Kṣatriyas),  Kāv. ;  Pur. ;  MWB. xiii, 1 ;  RTL. 110 ; 270  (also -ka)

results.rendered_html:
paraśurāma (pa˚ + rāma) m.
1〉 Rāma mit der Axt, Bein. Rāmaʼs, des Sohnes des Jamadagni,  H. 848 , Sch.  VP. 401 .  PRAB. 5,5 . ˚rāmaka  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 2〉 N. pr. eines neueren Fürsten, auf dessen Befehl der paraśurāmaprakāśa verfasst wurde,  Verz. d. B. H. No. 1025 ; vgl. [Page4-0494] 1283 . 1403 .
